action: Wire the durable peer terminal journal into the peer execution runtime and reject cross-runtime conflicting terminals.

progress.finding: Durable uniqueness must be acquired before downstream append; otherwise independent runtimes can each emit a terminal event after local verification.
progress.verification: 2 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical candidate source before commit

handoff: Implement a real atomic compare-and-set storage adapter and run the two-process collision test against that backend. Update existing runtime callers to supply terminalJournal and re-run the full repository test gate.
